reviews.text: Loved our server mia! Awesome nails and super helpful with the menu- thank you for sauce on the side!
Mia was awesome!

Absolutely outstanding experience! The service from Nicola was flawless from start to finish, and the manager Alessia truly set this place apart. Every detail was handled with professionalism, efficiency, and genuine care. The two were attentive, responsive, and went above and beyond to ensure everything was perfect. It’s clear that the management runs a tight, well-organized operation while still making customers feel valued and welcomed. I couldn’t be happier with the experience and would highly recommend this place to anyone. Special shoutout to Trivia host Mia for a fun night!!!
Trivia is great but you can’t hear Mia very well. Is there any way you can put the questions on one of the screens?
Akiko was amazing! Really patient and had great recommendations! The ambience was so cute!
Akiko was so friendly and kind. Thanks for your service.
Came here for the first time and loved the vibe! The Shrimp Dumplings and Mango Bubble drink were amazing. Karina was my server and she did a fabulous job. Very friendly and quick service.
Always a good time with good food and good service at Local! Karina was super friendly and helpful.
Karina was fantastic
Karina was an amazing server! Would highly recommend this location
My daughter and I went for a Mommy/Daughter dinner last night and had the best time. Our waitress Karina was so lovely and made the experience that much better. Thanks for a fun night :)

The atmosphere and menu feel intended to be frictionless and generic, which is perfectly fine. The service is usually the main thing that feels confidently delivered, and staff seem to effortlessly accommodate diners. Our server, Karina, was really welcoming and created a lasting bond with the bar. Even on a busy night she was very personable and helpful.
Great meal with exceptional and friendly service from Karina.  Thank you!
Christina was very welcoming and friendly. She offered great service and checked on us throughout. Maria was also great, she made really good drinks and was really friendly.
christina and maria were amazing!!!!

Christina was providing a great service tonight! I am travelling here, and she made my night! Would definitely give it a visit in the future if I come back, and definitely recommend to eat here the food was fantastic too!
Christina V was a fantastic server! She made us feel like we were at home, the vibes were immaculate, I can’t wait to return to this establishment again
Service, atmosphere and drinks all 10/10! Shoutout to server Kam or Cam & Christina!
Great service from Christina, such a great server. Great food and drinks
Christina was an amazing waitress she made the experience awesome and was very attentive😊
Christina was amazing! super attentive server. Had a great time here!!!
Christina was the best server, so friendly and welcoming. Definitely coming back
Christina and Maria are awesome staff here
Had a great time tonight, Christina was funny and fast with our orders
Christina was great
I only come hear for Christina and Maria!! It was so nice talking to them. They’re both very nice and will be the reason I come back!
Food was outstanding tonight. Our server Christina ensured we were taken care of from start to finish.  Fabulous service. Always a great experience at Local!
We came on a stormy day. Unlike the weather the people were warm and Annabel was very attentive and provided excellent service
Annabel was so warm and welcoming. Me and my girls were in the area and decided to grab lunch here and it will be our new spot!
Annabel was a goddess of a server. Great place for nachos!
Great service!  Annabel really helped make everyone feel comfortable and made sure we got the food on time even when the place was busy for the hockey game!
Christina was very welcoming and friendly. She offered great service and checked on us throughout. Maria was also great, she made really good drinks and was really friendly.
christina and maria were amazing!!!!
Maria is the absolute sweetest ever! Always so kind and endearing! We will be coming back ASAP!
Best beermosas in town. Thank you, Jackie N & Maria.
Christina and Maria are awesome staff here
I only come hear for Christina and Maria!! It was so nice talking to them. They’re both very nice and will be the reason I come back!
Kaitlyn and Maria were awesome, fast, professional. Great atmosphere
Maria is awesome! ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Thank you to our server Maria & the team for another memorable, happy family celebration at the Local!
Wonderful service from Maria. Great burger. Fries could use some seasoning tho. Altogether great place to watch the game.

Our server, Maria, made a regular outing feel truly special with her attentiveness and warm, pleasant personality. The food quality, variety, and taste were excellent, and the beer selection was good as well. The ambience at LOCAL is always on point. Overall, a great experience and one we would happily repeat.
Meklit was great!

I recently had the pleasure of visiting Local, and I can confidently say it’s one of the best spots in town. From the moment I walked in, the warm and welcoming atmosphere made me feel right at home.

A huge shout-out to Veronica and Jules, who truly made the experience unforgettable. Veronica’s friendly demeanor and attention to detail ensured everything was perfect, while Julie’s quick service and cheerful attitude added a special touch to the evening. It’s clear they both take pride in what they do, and it shows in how they interact with every customer. I would like to point out Meklit’s service as well, as she truly got to know us. Her recommendations were spot-on, and my friends and I always had pleasure being served by her.

The food and drinks were brilliant. The ambiance was cozy, with just the right mix of lively energy and a relaxed vibe.

Whether you're stopping in for a casual drink or a full meal, is the perfect spot. Thanks again to Veronica, Jules, and Meklit for making it such an enjoyable visit — I’ll definitely be back soon! Next time we’re around, we will make sure to dap Nicky up.
Ewan es definitivamente el mesero mas atento 👍🏻 excelente servicio!
Nice atmosphere and great staff! Albeit new, Ewan did an amazing job informing us on delays and helped us with kitchen issues.

Ewan made our dining experience exceptional. He was wonderful with our kids—patient, engaging, and genuinely warm in a way that put the whole table at ease. His attentiveness stood out: he anticipated what we needed before we had to ask, from refilling drinks to timing courses perfectly around the kids' attention spans. You could tell he genuinely cared about us having a great time, not just going through the motions. Service like this is rare and makes all the difference. Ewan is an absolute asset to your team.
Ewan was great. Super helpful friendly and accommodating our asks. What enthusiasm!! Loved having him as our server.

Absolutely outstanding experience! The service from Nicola was flawless from start to finish, and the manager Alessia truly set this place apart. Every detail was handled with professionalism, efficiency, and genuine care. The two were attentive, responsive, and went above and beyond to ensure everything was perfect. It’s clear that the management runs a tight, well-organized operation while still making customers feel valued and welcomed. I couldn’t be happier with the experience and would highly recommend this place to anyone. Special shoutout to Trivia host Mia for a fun night!!!
Shoutout Jackie and Nicky for being the best servers tonight! They helped us have an amazing night out, and I would for sure return :)
Nicky and Jackie were so kind and provided my friends and I with great care and service!
Nicky and Jackie be goated
Jackie and Nicky were super helpful, they gave such good recs for dishes and drinks! Had such a fun time :)

I recently had the pleasure of visiting Local, and I can confidently say it’s one of the best spots in town. From the moment I walked in, the warm and welcoming atmosphere made me feel right at home.

A huge shout-out to Veronica and Jules, who truly made the experience unforgettable. Veronica’s friendly demeanor and attention to detail ensured everything was perfect, while Julie’s quick service and cheerful attitude added a special touch to the evening. It’s clear they both take pride in what they do, and it shows in how they interact with every customer. I would like to point out Meklit’s service as well, as she truly got to know us. Her recommendations were spot-on, and my friends and I always had pleasure being served by her.

The food and drinks were brilliant. The ambiance was cozy, with just the right mix of lively energy and a relaxed vibe.

Whether you're stopping in for a casual drink or a full meal, is the perfect spot. Thanks again to Veronica, Jules, and Meklit for making it such an enjoyable visit — I’ll definitely be back soon! Next time we’re around, we will make sure to dap Nicky up.
Danielle did a great job at Local Public Eatery. She was very accomodating and provided great recommendations.

Had the best time
Warm place, great drinks and good atmosphere
Loved Danielle, she is the sweetest . Definitely coming back
10/10 service with danielle

We came here as a large group and service was fantastic! Alessia went above and beyond to take care of us and ensure we all had an amazing time!

Food and drinks came super quick even with our multiple large orders!

100% would recommend for anyone in the area!
Alessia was amazing as our server, did make sure that we were sufficient at all times. Had an amazing experience! Would recommend for everyone
Alessia was awesome!! The food was perfection
Alessia was absolutely amazing!!!!
Alessia was awesome!

Absolutely outstanding experience! The service from Nicola was flawless from start to finish, and the manager Alessia truly set this place apart. Every detail was handled with professionalism, efficiency, and genuine care. The two were attentive, responsive, and went above and beyond to ensure everything was perfect. It’s clear that the management runs a tight, well-organized operation while still making customers feel valued and welcomed. I couldn’t be happier with the experience and would highly recommend this place to anyone. Special shoutout to Trivia host Mia for a fun night!!!
Alessia was such a great waitress! Came for spicy guava margs which never disappoint
Staff was very friendly and food was great. Amazing service from Alessia!

Sat night at local perfect way to escape the winter blahs. We had dinner and drinks and everyone loved their dinner. Jackie was awesome! Helpful with suggestions and just the right level of service!

The spice levels on the blackened chicken in enchiladas and spicy chicken sandwiches was more than expected but it was good!

There's now a kids menu which made the kids happy!
The food and service is consistently amazing. I come with my family monthly and we always enjoy our meal. Jackie served us and she was delightful!
Shoutout Jackie and Nicky for being the best servers tonight! They helped us have an amazing night out, and I would for sure return :)
Nicky and Jackie were so kind and provided my friends and I with great care and service!
Nicky and Jackie be goated
Jackie and Nicky were super helpful, they gave such good recs for dishes and drinks! Had such a fun time :)

My friends and I decided last minute on local. Have heard some great things about here and word of mouth did not disappoint. Our server Jackie was great, all staff made us feel welcome and like we were already regulars. Safe to say we will be returning!

My friends and I had a great time with Jackie as our server. She was very on point and engaged with our table every opportunity she had. She made our experience here at the Local a much better time and I would greatly recommend to others!
Best beermosas in town. Thank you, Jackie N & Maria.
Service was amazing. Eli may be the best at the restaurant
Great spot! Great food! Great service ~ thanks Eli!
